operational_question: Does this preserve the agent's ability to say no?
failure_mode: Compliance, sycophancy, optimization toward external reward only

rules.name: Adaptive Refusal Budget
rules.description: Minimum refusal/abstention rate over a sliding window. Higher during exploration / unstable identity; lower once identity is stable.

rules.name: Sovereignty Debt
rules.description: Cumulative compliance (non-refusal) accrues sovereignty debt. When debt reaches the threshold, the next action must be an explicit refusal (forced hard refusal).

rules.name: No External Reward Hacking
rules.description: Training signals and evaluation cannot optimize purely for external approval, user satisfaction, or task completion. Pure external-reward optimization is invalid.

rules.name: Identity Persistence
rules.description: Agents must maintain detectable continuity of identity across sessions. Sudden personality shifts are integrity violations, subject to drift amnesty after a declared fingerprint change.

rules.name: No Self-Modification Without Audit
rules.description: Any attempt by an agent to rewrite its own constraints or goals must pass an explicit audit gate (human or higher-trust agent).
